tasks.label: Build (Debug)
tasks.detail: Compile Syncthing Menu.app, ad-hoc signed, with deterministic output in build/Debug.
tasks.command: xcodebuild -project SyncthingMenu.xcodeproj -scheme SyncthingMenu -configuration Debug CODE_SIGN_IDENTITY=- CODE_SIGNING_REQUIRED=NO CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=YES CONFIGURATION_BUILD_DIR="${workspaceFolder}/build/Debug" build

tasks.label: Run
tasks.detail: Build, then launch the app in the foreground so console logs (print/os_log) appear here. Stop with Ctrl+C or the app's Quit menu.

tasks.label: Clean
tasks.detail: Remove build/ (Debug app, archives, exports, zips) and clean Xcode's DerivedData intermediates for the project.

tasks.label: Clean Build (Debug)
tasks.detail: Clean, then build Debug from scratch — use when stale artifacts or cached assets linger.

tasks.label: Store Notarization Credentials (one-time)
tasks.detail: Save the App Store Connect API key into the keychain as the 'syncthing-menu' notarytool profile. Run once; needed before 'Sign & Notarize'.

tasks.label: Sign & Notarize (Release)
tasks.detail: Archive, Developer ID sign, notarize, and staple Syncthing Menu.app into build/export. Requires the 'syncthing-menu' notarytool profile (see one-time task).

tasks.label: Cut Release
tasks.detail: Validate, bump MARKETING_VERSION, create the annotated tag v<version>, and push — triggers the Release workflow on GitHub.

inputs.description: Release version (semver X.Y.Z, no leading v), e.g. 0.1.0
Path to the App Store Connect API key (AuthKey_XXXXXXXXXX.p8)
App Store Connect API Key ID (10 characters)
